cards.title: Automate home operations
cards.description: AI-Controlled home automation and robotics
typicalScenarios: Lighting and Temperature - Control home's lighting and temperature based on user preferences and time of day.
Cleaning - Operate home cleaning robots to maintain a clean living environment.

cards.title: Navigate
cards.description: Guide people, ground, air and water vehicles to navigate autonomously using AI.
typicalScenarios: Disaster Response - Operate a walking robot to navigate through a disaster site for rescue operations.
Agriculture - Drive a vehicle that can autonomously navigate a farm for tasks like seeding or harvesting.

cards.title: Human-robot interaction
cards.description: Use AI to power robots that interact or collaborate safely with people.
typicalScenarios: Customer Service - Operate a robot that can understand and respond to customer queries.
Manufacturing - Program a collaborative robot (cobot) to safely work alongside humans in a factory.

cards.title: Automate fulfillment
cards.description: Use AI to drive warehouse and supermarket systems, and control robots for efficient order fulfillment.
typicalScenarios: Warehouse - Automate order picking with robots programmed to navigate the layout efficiently.
Fulfillment Center - Operate robots to sort, pack, and dispatch goods based on order information.

cards.title: Interpret touch for control
cards.description: Enable intuitive control through touch-based interactions.
typicalScenarios: Tech sector - Navigating smartphone or tablet interfaces using touch gestures.
Design sector - Drawing or annotating on touch-enabled devices for creative work.

cards.title: Understand flavors and tastes
cards.description: Create and predict flavor profiles based on user purchases and new recipes.
typicalScenarios: Retail - Create personalized flavor profiles based on food and beverage purchases.
Food Industry - Predict the optimum flavor profiles for new recipes or food products.

cards.title: Predict chemical properties
cards.description: Forecast the smell or detect hazards based on chemical profiles.
typicalScenarios: Chemical Industry - Enhance fabric softener smell with optimal chemical combinations.
Safety and Security - Identify hazards based on unique chemical profiles.

cards.title: Navigate smartly with sensing
cards.description: Detect objects and environments for advanced navigation.
typicalScenarios: Robotics - Recognize objects and obstacles for safe, efficient robotic navigation.
Retail - Understand surroundings to provide context-aware product recommendations.

cards.title: Detect motion
cards.description: Use motion detection for improved interaction and monitoring.
typicalScenarios: Sports - Monitor and analyze athlete movements for performance improvements.
Security - Detect unusual motions for enhanced security surveillance and alerts.

cards.title: Streamline R&D
cards.description: Optimize research and development processes through intelligent AI analysis.
typicalScenarios: Lab Efficiency - Automate and optimize laboratory processes for increased efficiency with AI.
Product Success Prediction - Predict the success of new product developments based on historical data using AI.

cards.title: Adjust pricing
cards.description: Use AI for pricing optimization to enhance profitability.
typicalScenarios: Real-time Adjustments - Adjust product prices in real-time based on market demand and competition with AI.
Price Prediction - Predict the optimal price for a new product or service using AI.

cards.title: Improve routing
cards.description: Leverage AI to efficiently optimize routes, logistics, and supply chains.
typicalScenarios: Delivery Optimization - Determine the most efficient delivery routes to minimize time and fuel costs using AI.
Inventory Management - Optimize inventory management based on demand forecasting with AI.

cards.title: Enhance farming
cards.description: Use AI to optimize farming for enhanced efficiency.
typicalScenarios: Optimal Crop Growth - Utilize AI to analyze soil and weather data for optimal crop growth.
Crop Monitoring - Monitor crops throughout their growth cycle using cameras and sensors to notify if and when intervention is required.

cards.title: Enhance production
cards.description: Use AI to optimize production and warehousing for enhanced efficiency.
typicalScenarios: Maintenance Prediction - Predict machinery maintenance needs with AI to avoid production downtime.
Demand Forecast - Predict demand to optimize production, storage, and delivery of goods.

cards.title: Manage complex systems
cards.description: Use AI to efficiently manage cities, countries, and large factories.
typicalScenarios: Traffic Optimization - Analyze city traffic data with AI to optimize road networks and reduce congestion.
Resource Management - Use AI to manage national resources and public services efficiently.

cards.title: Spot damage, predict failure
cards.description: Leverage AI for damage detection and predictive maintenance.
typicalScenarios: Damage Detection - Detect signs of damage in machinery for timely repairs using AI.
Predictive Maintenance - Predict maintenance needs with AI to prevent unexpected equipment breakdowns.

cards.title: Optimize sales workflows
cards.description: Use AI for predictive insights and automation in sales workflows, streamlining tasks and CRM.
typicalScenarios: Lead Scoring - Evaluate past data with AI to prioritize leads, targeting promising prospects.
Tailored Follow-Ups - Assess customer interactions with AI to suggest custom actions, boosting sales closure rates.

cards.title: Streamline field service
cards.description: Boost technician productivity and simplify work order management through AI.
typicalScenarios: Field Service - Technicians receive summarized key points of work orders, enabling quicker job comprehension.
Management - Efficiently schedule and manage work orders with AI assistance.

cards.title: Simplify app development
cards.description: Speed up development and enhance creativity by transforming natural language into functional app components.
typicalScenarios: HR - Create employee onboarding apps quickly by describing the desired functionality.
Retail - Develop inventory management apps by converting sketches or designs into working prototypes.

cards.title: Quality control & maintenance
cards.description: Use AI for enhanced quality control and predictive maintenance.
typicalScenarios: Real-Time Defect Detection - Identify product defects in real-time during production processes with AI.
Quality Standards Improvement - Analyze historical data with AI to improve quality control standards.

cards.title: Visualize data
cards.description: Leverage AI to automatically visualize and interpret data relationships.
typicalScenarios: Sales - Use AI to generate visuals and reports, identifying customer trends and buying patterns.
Business Analysis - Employ AI for swift performance reporting and visual data arrangement.

cards.title: Gain market insights
cards.description: Utilize AI to understand market trends, forecast, and assess competitor behavior.
typicalScenarios: Retail - Analyze data points to understand market trends and inform strategic decisions.
Marketing - Track competitors' digital footprint to comprehend their strategies and performance.

cards.title: Analyze sentiments
cards.description: Leverage AI to detect and analyze sentiment in text and images.
typicalScenarios: Customer Service - Use AI to gauge customer sentiment from feedback or product reviews.
Marketing - Analyze social media comments with AI to assess public sentiment about a brand or event.

cards.title: Identify data patterns
cards.description: Use AI to detect patterns, connections, and associations in your data.
typicalScenarios: Transportation - Analyze traffic data with AI to identify congestion times and high-accident zones.
Healthcare - Use AI to analyze large amounts of healthcare data to detect early signs of diseases like cancer or Alzheimer’s.

cards.title: Detect anomalies
cards.description: Use AI to identify unusual patterns in data streams or image data.
typicalScenarios: Banking - Detect suspicious credit card activities that may indicate fraud.
Cybersecurity - Spot unusual traffic patterns in login data to detect potential cyber attacks.

cards.title: Understand customers
cards.description: Gain insights into customer behavior, predict their needs, and tailor solutions effectively.
typicalScenarios: Retail - Suggest products based on a customer's past purchases.
Marketing - Personalize campaigns based on customers' interactions with the brand.

cards.title: Predict risk or fraud
cards.description: Use AI to detect suspicious activities and predict potential fraud risks in real-time.
typicalScenarios: Banking - Identify suspicious patterns in transactions to detect potential fraud.
Cybersecurity - Predict threats in real-time to prevent data breaches.

cards.title: Forecast events & outcomes
cards.description: Use AI to predict future scenarios and outcomes based on historical data.
typicalScenarios: Project Management - Estimate project completion time based on past performance data.
Finance - Predict market trends to shape investment strategies.

cards.title: Predict customer churn
cards.description: Use AI to anticipate customer churn and respond proactively to retain them.
typicalScenarios: Subscription Services - Predict potential cancellations based on customer usage patterns.
Marketing - Offer personalized incentives to customers at risk of churning.

cards.title: Predict & plan demand
cards.description: Use AI to analyze sales data, identify patterns, and forecast demand accurately.
typicalScenarios: Sales - Analyze historical sales data to identify patterns and seasonality.
Inventory Management - Plan inventory based on forecasted demand to avoid stockouts and overstock.

cards.title: Simplify data analysis
cards.description: Use AI to create complex data queries and dashboards through natural language, making insights more accessible.
typicalScenarios: Sales - Generate expressions for trend analysis by describing the analytical goal.
Customer Service - Build a dashboard summarizing customer feedback using natural language queries.

cards.title: Spot anomalies
cards.description: Leverage AI to find unusual data patterns or outliers, allowing for early issue detection and proactive solutions.
typicalScenarios: Manufacturing - Monitor equipment data to spot anomalies, enable proactive maintenance, and avoid costly breakdowns.
Healthcare - Detect anomalies in patient health data for early detection of potential health issues.

cards.title: Moderate content
cards.description: Use AI to automatically detect and filter inappropriate or harmful content, ensuring a safe digital environment.
typicalScenarios: E-commerce - Review product listings and user reviews for potentially fraudulent or inappropriate content.
Social Media - Filter offensive language, images, and videos to maintain a safe online community.

cards.title: Enhance decisions
cards.description: Use AI to assist in complex decision making, optimize processes, and predict outcomes, boosting efficiency and effectiveness.
typicalScenarios: Retail - Predict sales trends and optimize inventory management for business efficiency.
Healthcare - Aid clinical decisions by predicting patient outcomes based on historical data.

cards.title: Personalize content
cards.description: Leverage AI to generate tailored content suggestions based on user behavior, boosting customer engagement and experience.
typicalScenarios: E-commerce - Personalize product suggestions based on user browsing history, purchasing behavior, and satisfaction.
Streaming Services - Offer tailored movie or music recommendations based on user preferences, improving user experience.

cards.title: Boost sales with insights
cards.description: Leverage CRM data with AI to enhance sales strategies and customer relationships.
typicalScenarios: Marketing - Draft personalized sales emails using data insights for improved engagement.
Sales - Summarize customer meetings and auto-update records, ensuring data accuracy.

cards.title: Streamline financial processes
cards.description: Utilize AI to automate financial tasks, improving accuracy and efficiency.
typicalScenarios: E-commerce - Auto-generate detailed product descriptions for online catalogs.
Banking - Assess credit risks by analyzing customer financial data.

cards.title: Refine processes
cards.description: Leverage AI’s ability to learn from past experiences and enhance actions, leading to better performance and efficiency.
typicalScenarios: Manufacturing - Use AI for predictive maintenance, minimize downtime, and reduce costs.
Education - Employ AI to adapt to students’ learning styles, improving educational outcomes.

cards.title: Optimize strategy
cards.description: Use AI to predict and execute proactive strategies, optimizing results and boosting efficiency.
typicalScenarios: Sales & Marketing - Predict the optimal strategy or sales approach for each customer, increasing conversions.
Customer Service - Use AI to suggest the best response to customer inquiries, enhancing satisfaction and retention.

cards.title: Resolve complex issues
cards.description: Use AI to analyze vast data, forecast outcomes, and provide optimized solutions to intricate problems.
typicalScenarios: Supply Chain - Enhance logistics and inventory management by predicting demand and identifying bottlenecks.
Cybersecurity - Employ AI to detect potential security threats, enabling proactive defense strategies.

cards.title: Help with admin tasks
cards.description: Use AI to automate repetitive and time-consuming office tasks.
typicalScenarios: Finance - Automate data entry and report generation for increased efficiency.
HR - Intelligently schedule meetings based on everyone's availability.

cards.title: Simplify household tasks
cards.description: Use AI to automate and simplify everyday household tasks.
typicalScenarios: Smart Home - Control lights, thermostats, and locks through voice commands.
Energy Management - Monitor and regulate appliance energy usage for optimized consumption.

cards.title: Help with personal tasks
cards.description: Utilize AI to assist with daily personal tasks and health management.
typicalScenarios: Health & Fitness - Get personalized fitness and health recommendations based on lifestyle and goals.
Personal Reminders - Set reminders for appointments, medication intake, or bill payments.

cards.title: Workflow creation
cards.description: Use AI to create the steps for a workflow, enhancing efficiency.
typicalScenarios: Finance - Automate expense approval processes by letting AI interpret descriptive sentences.
Customer Service - Streamline responses by generating automation flows from common inquiries.

cards.title: Recognize and understand forms
cards.description: Use AI to extract data from various forms like receipts, invoices, and standard government or business documents.
typicalScenarios: Handwritten Text - AI can identify handwritten text along with printed text.
Custom Models - Train custom AI models to recognize specific types of forms and documents.

cards.title: Identify objects
cards.description: Use AI to create custom image recognition models for specific needs and applications.
typicalScenarios: Accessibility - Assist visually impaired users with descriptions of environments.
Retail - Automatically identify and catalog products in images for streamlined inventory management.

cards.title: Convert images to text
cards.description: Use AI to transform various types of documents into editable and searchable data.
typicalScenarios: Administration - Convert printed documents into digital text for easy search and retrieval.
Education - Transform printed textbooks into digital format, facilitating remote learning.

cards.title: Identify faces
cards.description: Use AI to identify or verify a person's identity by comparing and analyzing patterns based on facial contours.
typicalScenarios: Security Systems - Enhance security by enabling systems to identify authorized individuals for access control.
Social Media - Enables automatic tagging of individuals in social media platforms.

cards.title: Understand environments
cards.description: Use AI to interpret relationships, patterns, and trends between different locations or spaces.
typicalScenarios: Retail - Analyze customer movements and interactions within the store to understand behavior.
Urban Planning - Optimize infrastructure and services by analyzing spatial data like population density or traffic patterns.

cards.title: Analyze images
cards.description: Utilize AI to understand, interpret, and derive insights from visual data.
typicalScenarios: Agriculture - Assist farmers in crop monitoring by analyzing drone-captured images of farmland for signs of disease or distress.
Traffic Control - Manage traffic by analyzing real-time road images to identify congestion, accidents, or violations.

cards.title: Categorize images
cards.description: Use AI to tag images based on their content, simplifying management and retrieval of visual data.
typicalScenarios: Digital Asset Management - Simplify management of large image libraries by tagging images for easy retrieval.
E-Commerce - Enhance customer experience by tagging product images, enabling customers to search for similar products.

cards.title: Create image captions
cards.description: Use AI to generate textual descriptions of images, enhancing understanding without visual perception.
typicalScenarios: Accessibility - Improve accessibility for visually impaired users with textual descriptions of images on websites or applications.
Education - Assist learning by providing detailed captions for educational images or diagrams.

cards.title: Generate image metadata
cards.description: Use AI to create structured data about images, enhancing searchability and management.
typicalScenarios: Digital Archives - Facilitate search and retrieval in large image archives by generating detailed metadata for each image.
Photography - Assist photographers in managing their portfolios by creating metadata for each photograph, including details like location, subject, and camera settings.

cards.title: Analyze emotion and sentiment
cards.description: Use AI to detect and analyze user sentiment from text, helping to improve services and customer interactions.
typicalScenarios: Customer Support - Analyze customer feedback or complaints with AI, identifying negative sentiments to prioritize actions and improve satisfaction.
Market Research - Understand customer sentiments from social media posts or product reviews, providing insights into public opinion and brand perception.

cards.title: Generate contextual text
cards.description: Use AI to generate contextually relevant and personalized text, enhancing user experience and productivity.
typicalScenarios: Content Creation - Create drafts for articles, blogs, or social media posts with AI to aid creation and curation.
Email Composition - Suggest email responses or draft emails based on past interactions with AI, saving time and effort.

cards.title: Summarize text
cards.description: Use AI to extract key points from large text data, aiding in quick understanding and efficient information retrieval.
typicalScenarios: Business Reports - Summarize lengthy business reports into key insights with AI, enabling swift decision-making.
News Digest - Summarize news articles into key points with AI, enabling readers to quickly grasp the main information.

cards.title: Translate text
cards.description: Use AI for translation across multiple languages, facilitating global communication and breaking language barriers.
typicalScenarios: International Business - Translate business documents or emails instantly with AI, enabling smooth communication in multinational companies.
Education - Translate educational materials with AI, providing access to diverse learning resources and aiding in multilingual education.

cards.title: Engage in natural conversations
cards.description: Use AI to facilitate natural and engaging conversations, enhancing user experience and interaction.
typicalScenarios: Customer Support - Understand and respond to user queries in natural language through an AI-powered chatbot.
Voice Assistants - Engage in voice-based interactions with users for hands-free operations using AI.

cards.title: Convert text into speech
cards.description: Use AI to transform text into lifelike speech, enhancing accessibility and user experience.
typicalScenarios: Accessibility - Read out articles, books, or documents with AI for users with visual impairments.
Voice Assistants - Provide voice-based responses or instructions in applications or devices using AI.

cards.title: Automate answers
cards.description: Quickly address inquiries with instant, precise responses.
typicalScenarios: Retail - Handle customer queries about products via chatbot.
Travel - Answer queries from airport guests on services and navigation.

cards.title: Translate speech instantly
cards.description: Enable instant translation of spoken language for seamless communication.
typicalScenarios: Customer Support - Provide real-time translation in multilingual customer interactions.
Travel & Tourism - Facilitate communication for travelers by translating local languages instantly.

cards.title: Communicate via avatar
cards.description: Create engaging experiences with audio and visual avatars for immersive gaming and personal assistants.
typicalScenarios: Gaming Industry - Enhance user immersion with unique voiced characters.
Virtual Assistants - Improve user engagement with lifelike, expressive voices.

cards.title: Understand user intent
cards.description: Interpret human language to identify users' specific intentions and context.
typicalScenarios: Customer Service - Understand customer requests and provide accurate support.
Chatbots - Enable chatbots to understand queries and provide relevant responses.

cards.title: Generate images from text
cards.description: Create unique images from textual descriptions utilizing AI.
typicalScenarios: Entertainment & Media - Create unique characters and scenes for movies or games from text descriptions.
Advertising - Generate visuals for ad campaigns based on text-described themes or concepts.

cards.title: Generate or enhance text
cards.description: Implement advanced natural language understanding for more sophisticated, human-like interactions.
typicalScenarios: Content Creation - Generate high-quality text for blogs, articles, or social media posts, enhancing productivity.
Data Analysis - Extract insights from large volumes of text data, enabling informed business decisions.

cards.title: Generate synthetic data
cards.description: Create synthetic data that mimics real data for robust model training without compromising privacy.
typicalScenarios: Finance - Simulate financial scenarios to test models, enhancing risk management without revealing sensitive data.
Retail - Generate synthetic customer behavior data to optimize sales strategies while preserving customer privacy.

cards.title: Personalize marketing
cards.description: Use AI to tailor marketing campaigns by analyzing customer data and predicting optimal engagement strategies.
typicalScenarios: Targeted Campaigns - Segment customers based on behavior and preferences for impactful marketing campaigns with AI.
Content Improvement - Leverage AI to suggest enhancements to marketing content, aligning with target audience interests.

cards.title: Create dynamic web pages
cards.description: Use AI to generate text, forms, and layouts for web pages, simplifying web development.
typicalScenarios: Form Creation - Use AI to automatically generate detailed forms for event registrations.
Dynamic Layouts - Create dynamic webpage layouts for a product catalog using AI.

cards.title: Convert speech to text
cards.description: Transcribe spoken language into text with AI and enable further text-based use.
typicalScenarios: Transcription Services - Automate transcription of interviews, meetings, or lectures.
Voice Assistants - Convert spoken commands into text for processing.

cards.title: Identify voices
cards.description: Use unique voice characteristics to enhance security and personalization.
typicalScenarios: Customer Service - Identify callers for personalized interactions and swift verification.
Smart Home Devices - Customize user experience by recognizing different household members' voices.

cards.title: Activate with keyword
cards.description: Personalize activation of AI assistants or IoT devices using specific keywords.
typicalScenarios: AI Assistants - Allow users to activate assistants with preferred catchphrases.
Automotive Industry - Improve driving experience with custom voice command activation.

cards.title: Enable voice commands
cards.description: Interact with devices or applications hands-free for convenience and accessibility.
typicalScenarios: Healthcare Industry - Assist medical professionals in accessing information or controlling equipment hands-free.
Smart Home Appliances - Control home appliances like lights or thermostats through voice commands.

cards.title: Understand special context
cards.description: Tailor speech synthesis and recognition for specific contexts, accents, or industries.
typicalScenarios: Telecommunications - Train voice assistants to understand industry-specific jargon and accents.
Healthcare Industry - Enable medical applications to understand and generate medical terminologies.

cards.title: Mimic specific voices
cards.description: Create lifelike, synthesized speech that mirrors individual vocal characteristics.
typicalScenarios: Entertainment Industry - Create realistic voiceovers for animated characters or digital influencers.
Accessibility - Develop assistive technologies that speak in familiar voices for users with special needs.

cards.title: Extract information
cards.description: Use AI for efficient and speedy extraction of vital data from large databases or unsorted data stores, enhancing research and productivity.
typicalScenarios: Legal and Tax - Use AI to quickly locate pertinent cases, laws, and regulations from extensive legal databases.
Scientific Research - Implement AI to swiftly sift through scholarly articles and extract key findings.

cards.title: Retrieve information
cards.description: Enhance productivity by using AI to find relevant information quickly.
typicalScenarios: E-Commerce - Analyze user behavior and preferences to deliver precise personalized product recommendations.
Learning - Assist students by finding specific information to help learn and study a concept.

cards.title: Organize data
cards.description: Use AI to efficiently categorize and organize data, enhancing analysis and decision-making.
typicalScenarios: Healthcare - Categorize patient data by symptoms, diagnosis, and treatment to aid in research and patient care.
Marketing - Identify and group customers to target marketing efforts effectively based on their interests, shopping habits, or annual spending.

cards.title: Discover patterns
cards.description: Harness AI to identify patterns and relationships in data, leading to insightful analysis and decision-making.
typicalScenarios: Marketing - Employ AI to group customers based on purchasing behavior, demographics, and preferences for targeted marketing.
Social Media - Use AI to identify and group trending sentiments or topics, aiding sentiment analysis and trend prediction.

cards.title: Structure raw data
cards.description: Leverage AI to transform raw, unstructured data into a structured format for easier analysis and insights extraction.
typicalScenarios: Text Mining - Convert unstructured text from social media, emails, or reviews into structured data for sentiment analysis or trend identification.
Healthcare - Organize disparate, unstructured patient data into structured records, enhancing healthcare delivery and research.
